summary: Verified LARGE-file chunked upload path end-to-end in the browser. Chunked init/part/complete pipeline works correctly, image is fully assembled and rendered in both teacher preview and child quest board.

test_evidence.console_errors_during_upload: None (only React devtools info + benign Dialog aria-describedby warning)

issues: Radix DialogContent missing Description or aria-describedby (accessibility warning in console, non-blocking)

error_toast_check: Not force-triggered; code inspected earlier confirmed handleQuestFileUpload throws when res.url missing and toast now displays 'Upload failed: <detail>'. Since happy-path succeeded (res.url present), no toast was expected in this run.
critical_code_review_comments: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby - add DialogDescription for a11y (minor).
test_credentials: Teacher: test_teacher_1 / testpassword; Child: classmate_g3 / testpass123
seed_data_creation: Created quest quest_f1ca5314f3a8 (TEST_LargeUpload_Quest) in demo_classroom_1 via POST /api/teacher/quests; used the chunked-uploaded image; then DELETED via DELETE /api/teacher/quests/quest_f1ca5314f3a8 (message: 'Quest deleted'). Uploaded file /api/uploads/quests/0bcdd74efcd244da.webp remains on disk (harmless, shared asset).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chunked upload (>512KB) is fully verified: init->part(x4)->complete returns proper /api/uploads/quests/<hash>.webp URL, backend GET returns content-length exactly matching source (1,839,280 bytes = no truncation/corruption), preview renders 1600x1200, and child at /quests sees the quest with image loaded (naturalWidth=1600). Previous iteration_72 verified small-file direct upload. Both paths PASS. The originally reported bug (broken preview / child not seeing image) can no longer be reproduced; may have been fixed by improvements to chunkedUpload.js/uploads.py referenced in the request.
